record-validation.description: a record with no source is rejected by construction
a record with a source is accepted

feedback-deltas.description: helpful adds exactly +0.05 confidence and +1 accessCount
wrong subtracts exactly 0.20 and adds the review tag

ranking-order.description: superseded penalty dominates: a superseded record ranks below a fresh one with identical content relevance

records.content: we deploy the api with docker on mondays
we deploy the api with docker on fridays

ranking-order.query: when do we deploy the api with docker

ranking-order.description: confidence multiplies the whole score: identical records rank by confidence

records.content: the deploy window is monday morning
the deploy window is monday morning

sleep-guardrails.description: old low-access plain record archives; dream-derived record with identical age does not

records.content: random one-off note about parking near the office
synthesized insight about the quarterly roadmap

conflict-gate.description: auto-resolve marks the loser supersededBy and deletes nothing

a.content: always enable telemetry uploads for diagnostics

b.content: never enable telemetry uploads for diagnostics

ledger-audit.description: create then feedback reconstructs: actions in order, previous and new confidence present

dream-boundary.description: dream proposals never materialize before approval; approval creates a long_term record with lineage
